name: prop-hunt
description: Skeleton multiplayer prop hunt — static site (Cloudflare Pages), P2P WebRTC between browsers via PeerJS's free public broker. No server, no build step.
_devDependencies_note: three is ONLY for the offline authoring checks under tools/ (e.g. check-hunter-model-size.mjs loads the real GLB with GLTFLoader and runs the SAME sizing code the game ships). The GAME never uses node_modules — it imports three from the CDN importmap in index.html. Pinned to the app's version (0.161.0) so the check matches what ships.
